title: Bug in subselect (count function)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE unitTestFuzz (X String NOT NULL, Y Int32, Z Float64, W Date DEFAULT today());
INSERT INTO unitTestFuzz VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT X, (SELECT COUNT() FROM unitTestFuzz WHERE Z IS NULL OR Z < COALESCE(Z, 0.0) + 1) AS CountNulls FROM unitTestFuzz;
key_bug_features: Count function in subselect with NULL values
